education.label: education
education.title: All-inclusive in education.
education.subtitle: Path to the offer
education.description: You come, and everything is taken care of for you: from the first steps to finding a job. You immerse yourself in an environment focused on results. I guide you at every stage.

steps.title: Onboarding and first mock interview
steps.description: We determine your starting level, get acquainted with the platform and tools. We conduct the first trial interview to understand the learning path and immediately identify key areas for growth.

steps.title: Learning materials
steps.description: Each module contains theory, a checklist of questions and practical tasks. Step by step you master HTML, JS, React, TypeScript, CI/CD, Docker and other technologies.

steps.title: Support and community
steps.description: All doubts and questions are resolved in the chat with students and with me personally. You get help at any stage, you don't get stuck, you move forward.

steps.title: Exams and feedback
steps.description: After each block you pass theory and tasks to the mentor. You get a detailed analysis of mistakes and advice on how to improve the result.

steps.title: Progress control
steps.description: I monitor performance, timely adjust training and help overcome difficulties. Your growth is always under my supervision.

steps.title: Practice and group activities
steps.description: 4 times a week: joint task reviews, mock interviews, code reviews and workshops. Constant engagement, calls and communication.

steps.title: Final project
steps.description: You build your application step by step after each technology. Not an online store or Weather app, but a real system with API and layouts, just like in a real job.

steps.title: Internship on a real production project
steps.description: You work in a team of 100+ people: Frontend, Backend, QA, design, analytics. Full development cycle, releases, code reviews, agile processes.

steps.title: Preparation for the offer
steps.description: We create a strong resume, conduct mock interviews, job search strategy. You are ready for any interview and can immediately show your competencies.
